Title: Ide yo Shenron! Saiya-jin tsui ni chikyû tôchaku

Plot: Kaiô times Goku on catching Bubbles and Gregory, and Goku practices the Genki Dama technique. Goku then contacts Master Roshi and tells him to wish him back to life, and he begins his journey back down Hebi no mishi. Meanwhile, as...
